nasb.text: and you sat on a splendid couch with a table arranged before it on which you had set My incense and My oil.

esv.text: You sat on a stately couch, with a table spread before it on which you had placed my incense and my oil.

cnv.text: 你們坐在華麗的床上，床前放置了一張桌子，把我的香料和膏油放在上面。

ccb.text: 坐在华丽的床上，面前的桌子上摆设着我的香料和膏油。
